productDisplayName: Nike Men AS FCB Core T Black T-shirts
description: Composition Black crew neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, fabric tape on inseam of the neckline, has graphic print with metallic tints on the chest and Barcelona badge printed on left sleeve Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Cool iron, but do not iron on design Do not dry clean If your heart beats for the Barcelona team, then this t-shirt is a msut-have in your Sports collection. Team this with shorts and soccer cleats for that ultimate look and feel of the game.
